justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "staying tonight" as a request for an appointment tomorrow morning, requiring clarification from the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed three alternative times on the same day after the initial requested slot was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one unnecessary clarification regarding the date, but otherwise the conversation was efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with the agent being polite and successfully booking the appointment despite a minor initial misunderstanding.
